display.purpose: Hero headline only; revealed line-by-line on load.

headline.purpose: Section titles; stand alone with no eyebrow above.

body.purpose: Paragraph copy at 17px; muted variants at .76/.68 ink alpha.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Resting lift on key cards and the hover state of service/price cards. Green-tinted, not neutral.

shadows.name: cta-pop
shadows.purpose: Firmest shadow on the page — primary buttons and the booking card; signals the action.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default UI easing — buttons, cards, toggles. Strong, no bounce, ~180ms.

motion.name: ease-drawer
motion.purpose: iOS-style curve for the cookie banner / mobile menu slide-in.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Active-state press feedback on every pressable element.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA; points at the Reservio booking. Pill, forest green, tactile press.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Online konzultace <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14M13 6l6 6-6 6"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; background:#235943; color:#fff; font-weight:700; font-size:1rem; padding:16px 30px; border:none; border-radius:999px; cursor:pointer; box-shadow:0 24px 60px -20px rgba(11,33,24,.34); transition:transform .18s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1), background .25s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#16382A; transform:translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:scale(.97); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower-emphasis action (phone, navigate). White with hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; background:#fff; color:#1B2A22; font-weight:700; font-size:1rem; padding:16px 30px; border:1.5px solid rgba(27,42,34,.12); border-radius:999px; cursor:pointer; transition:transform .18s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1), border-color .25s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color:#1B2A22; transform:translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform:scale(.97); }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Standard content card; flat at rest, lifts on hover (pointer devices only).
components.html:
Daňová přiznání

Zpracování podkladů a podání přiznání bez stresu z termínů.
components.css: .ds-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(27,42,34,.12); border-radius:20px; padding:28px 24px; transition:transform .2s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1), box-shadow .2s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1); } @media (hover:hover) and (pointer:fine){ .ds-card:hover { transform:translateY(-6px); box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(22,56,42,.06), 0 18px 44px -18px rgba(22,56,42,.22); } } .ds-card-ico { display:grid; place-items:center; width:52px; height:52px; border-radius:16px; background:#DDE7DD; color:#16382A; margin-bottom:18px; } .ds-card-h { font-size:1.08rem; font-weight:800; color:#1B2A22; margin:0 0 10px; } .ds-card-p { font-size:.92rem; line-height:1.6; color:rgba(27,42,34,.76); margin:0; }

components.name: Featured Service Card
components.description: The one flagship service; sage fill, larger, spans two columns. Hierarchy by emphasis, not repetition.
components.html:
Vedení účetnictví

Kompletní vedení účetnictví i daňové evidence pro OSVČ, firmy i neziskové organizace — pečlivě, včas a srozumitelně.
components.css: .ds-card-feat { background:#DDE7DD; border-radius:20px; padding:28px 24px; } .ds-card-feat-ico { display:grid; place-items:center; width:60px; height:60px; border-radius:16px; background:#fff; color:#16382A; margin-bottom:18px; } .ds-card-feat-h { font-size:1.35rem; font-weight:800; color:#1B2A22; margin:0 0 10px; } .ds-card-feat-p { font-size:1rem; line-height:1.6; color:rgba(27,42,34,.76); margin:0; max-width:48ch; }

components.name: Eyebrow Chip
components.description: Hero-only category label. Never repeated over section headings.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; background:#DDE7DD; color:#16382A; font-size:.82rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.12em; padding:7px 16px; border-radius:999px; }

narrative.overview: A one-page conversion site for a Prague accounting firm that must read like a good set of books: ordered, calm, unmistakably trustworthy. Serious without being cold — a small practice with a personal touch, not a faceless call-centre. Restrained density, generous whitespace, one idea per fold, copy that gets out of the way. Every CTA points at online booking, so the design builds quiet confidence and removes friction rather than dazzling. It rejects the warm-cream AI-editorial default, bright SaaS accents, and template scaffolding; warmth comes from the green and the typography, not a tinted paper background.
keyCharacteristics: Cool porcelain canvas, deep forest-green identity — finance, money, trust.
One typeface (Manrope), hierarchy by weight and size, not pairing.
Flat at rest; soft green-tinted lift on interactive surfaces only.
Hierarchy by emphasis (one featured item), never endless repetition.
Quiet, crisp motion: instant press feedback, fast custom ease-out, no bounce.

rules.name: The Porcelain-and-Pine Rule
rules.body: The body is cool porcelain and the ink is pine-tinted near-black. Never a warm cream/sand/beige body, and never pure #000 text. Warmth lives in the green and the words.

rules.name: The No-Bright-Accent Rule
rules.body: Accents stay deep and muted (forest, bottle, sage). Bright blue and bright orange are forbidden — generic-SaaS or un-serious for accounting.

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: Forest Ledger Green is the single accent. No second hue family; emphasis comes from the dark-green register and weight.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Manrope only. Contrast by weight (800 vs 500) and size, never by a second typeface.

rules.name: The Hero-Only Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: The uppercase tracked label appears exactly once — the hero chip. Section headings carry themselves.

rules.name: The Soft-Lift Rule
rules.body: Cards are flat at rest with a hairline border. The lift appears only on hover, only on pointer devices, so it never sticks after a tap.

dos: Do keep the body Cool Porcelain (#EEF0EE) and ink Pine (#1B2A22); carry warmth through green + type.
Do let Forest Green (#235943) be the single accent; go Deep Bottle (#16382A) for dark blocks.
Do give every pressable element :active scale(.97) and gate hover lifts behind @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine).
Do create emphasis with one featured item, not by repeating identical cards.
Do keep body/muted text ≥ 4.5:1; muted captions use ink at .68 alpha, never lighter.
Do keep CTA labels to ≤ 2 words and point every CTA at the Reservio booking.
donts: Don't use a warm cream/sand/beige body, or pure black text.
Don't introduce bright blue or bright orange, or any second accent hue.
Don't stamp an uppercase eyebrow kicker above every section — hero only.
Don't build walls of identical icon-cards; vary by hierarchy.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, side-stripe borders, or bounce/elastic easing.
Don't pair a second typeface; Manrope weight contrast only.
Don't mention the Ukrainian language in the Czech hero value-prop; language belongs in FAQ/About.
